metaTitle: Mob Reference — Tribulation | Difficulty Overhaul for Minecraft
metaDescription: Per-mob reference for all 21 scaled vanilla mobs: exact scaling rates and caps, tier-gated abilities with unlock levels, zombie variants, boss scaling, and modded mob fallback.
ogDescription: Every scaled mob, its exact rates and caps, and the abilities it unlocks at each tier.
title: Mob Reference
lede: All 21 scaled vanilla mobs, what they gain per level, and the abilities they unlock at each tier. Every number below is the shipping default — all of it is tunable in config.

html: Each mob's stat line shows the time-axis gain per player level and its cap, per attribute. Health, damage, and speed are percentages of the mob's base stat (a zombie at +250% health has 3.5× its vanilla 20 HP); armor and toughness are flat points. Distance and height bonuses stack on top of health, damage, armor, and toughness, and global stat caps (health 4.0×, damage 4.5×) bound the total — see Features for the axis math.
Abilities unlock at the five tier thresholds — levels 50 / 100 / 150 / 200 / 250 by default — and stay with the mob for life: a mob's tier is frozen at spawn. Every ability has its own config toggle.

blocks.html: Follow range also scales for every listed mob (+1.0%/level, max +100%; +0.8%/level, max +80% for endermite, silverfish, and witch). Abilities that place or break blocks respect the mobGriefing gamerule.

sections.title: Zombie Family
sections.intro: The four zombie-family mobs can also roll the Big (10%: +10 HP, +2 damage, 0.7× speed, 1.3× size) or Speed (10%: 1.3× speed, −10 HP) variant on top of normal scaling.

items.title: Zombie
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.5%/lvl (max +375%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.032/lvl (max +8) · Toughness +0.024/lvl (max +6)
bullets: Tier 1 (lvl 50): +10% chance to summon reinforcements when hurt (vanilla mechanic, boosted)
Tier 3 (lvl 150): breaks down doors (vanilla hard-difficulty behavior, always on)
Tier 5 (lvl 250): sprints — +15% movement speed

items.title: Husk
html: HP +1.1%/lvl (max +275%) · Damage +1.5%/lvl (max +375%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.032/lvl (max +8) · Toughness +0.024/lvl (max +6)
bullets: Tier 4 (lvl 200): its hits inflict Hunger II instead of vanilla's Hunger I (same duration)

items.title: Drowned
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Tier 2 (lvl 100): spawns holding a trident if it would otherwise be empty-handed

items.title: Zombified Piglin
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.5%/lvl (max +375%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Tier 5 (lvl 250): +50% follow range — the pack aggros from much further away

items.title: Skeleton
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.2%/lvl (max +300%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.020/lvl (max +5) · Toughness +0.015/lvl (max +4)
bullets: Tier 2 (lvl 100): trades its bow for a stone sword at spawn — a melee skirmisher instead of an archer
Tier 4 (lvl 200): permanently aflame (with Fire Resistance), so every arrow is a flame arrow — vanilla's burning-skeleton mechanic

items.title: Stray
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.2%/lvl (max +300%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.020/lvl (max +5) · Toughness +0.015/lvl (max +4)
bullets: Stat scaling only — keeps its vanilla Slowness arrows, now backed by a much deeper health pool

items.title: Bogged
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.2%/lvl (max +300%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.020/lvl (max +5) · Toughness +0.015/lvl (max +4)
bullets: Stat scaling only — its vanilla poison arrows need no help

items.title: Wither Skeleton
html: HP +1.2%/lvl (max +300%) · Damage +1.6%/lvl (max +400%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Tier 3 (lvl 150): sprints — +15% movement speed
Tier 4 (lvl 200): its held weapon gains Fire Aspect I — Wither effect and fire in one hit

items.title: Spider
html: HP +0.8%/lvl (max +200%) · Damage +1.2%/lvl (max +300%) · Speed +0.2%/lvl (max +50%) · Armor +0.016/lvl (max +4) · Toughness +0.012/lvl (max +3)
bullets: Tier 2 (lvl 100): places a cobweb at your feet on a successful hit (only into air, respects mobGriefing)
Tier 3 (lvl 150): tramples crops and farmland in a 3×3 area around its target on hit
Tier 5 (lvl 250): leap attack — +50% jump strength

items.title: Cave Spider
html: HP +0.6%/lvl (max +150%) · Damage +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Speed +0.2%/lvl (max +50%) · Armor +0.008/lvl (max +2) · Toughness +0.008/lvl (max +2)
bullets: Tier 2 (lvl 100): places a cobweb at your feet on hit — poison plus a snare

items.title: Silverfish
html: HP +0.5%/lvl (max +125%) · Damage +0.8%/lvl (max +200%) · Speed +0.1%/lvl (max +25%) · no armor scaling
bullets: Stat scaling only — deliberately light; the swarm is the threat

items.title: Endermite
html: HP +0.5%/lvl (max +125%) · Damage +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Speed +0.24%/lvl (max +60%) · no armor scaling
bullets: Stat scaling only, with the fastest speed scaling in the roster

items.title: Pillager
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Stat scaling only — crossbow damage rides the damage axis

items.title: Vindicator
html: HP +1.2%/lvl (max +300%) · Damage +2.0%/lvl (max +500%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.032/lvl (max +8) · Toughness +0.024/lvl (max +6)
bullets: The steepest damage scaling in the roster — its axe was already vanilla's hardest-hitting weapon
Tier 4 (lvl 200): permanent Resistance I — takes 20% less damage from everything

items.title: Witch
html: HP +0.8%/lvl (max +200%) · Damage +0.8%/lvl (max +200%) · Speed +0.08%/lvl (max +20%) · Armor +0.016/lvl (max +4) · Toughness +0.012/lvl (max +3)
bullets: Stat scaling only, kept gentle on purpose — her vanilla potion kit is the threat

items.title: Ravager
html: HP +1.6%/lvl (max +400%) · Damage +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Speed +0.08%/lvl (max +20%) · Armor +0.032/lvl (max +8) · Toughness +0.024/lvl (max +6)
bullets: The biggest health scaling in the roster — a late-raid Ravager is a siege engine

items.title: Piglin
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Tier 2 (lvl 100): spawns holding a crossbow if it would otherwise be empty-handed

items.title: Hoglin
html: HP +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Damage +1.6%/lvl (max +400%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Tier 1 (lvl 50): +0.5 knockback resistance — it keeps charging through your hits

items.title: Zoglin
html: HP +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Damage +1.5%/lvl (max +375%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.024/lvl (max +6) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Tier 3 (lvl 150): permanent Fire Resistance — lava and flame won't save you

items.title: Guardian
html: HP +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Damage +1.4%/lvl (max +350%) · Speed +0.1%/lvl (max +25%) · Armor +0.020/lvl (max +5) · Toughness +0.020/lvl (max +5)
bullets: Stat scaling only — the beam damage rides the damage axis

items.title: Creeper
html: HP +0.8%/lvl (max +200%) · Damage +1.0%/lvl (max +250%) · Speed +0.12%/lvl (max +30%) · Armor +0.016/lvl (max +4) · Toughness +0.012/lvl (max +3)
bullets: Tier 1 (lvl 50): shorter fuse — 15 ticks (0.75s) instead of vanilla's 30 (1.5s)
Tier 5 (lvl 250): 25% chance to spawn charged, exactly as if struck by lightning

items.title: Modded Hostile Mobs
html: Any modded mob extending Monster automatically gets the conservative fallback: zombie-equivalent health (+1.0%/lvl, max +250%) and damage (+1.5%/lvl, max +375%) only — no speed, armor, or AI changes, so the mod author's tuning is respected. Exclude namespaces or override individual entities in config.

items.title: Bosses
html: The Ender Dragon, Wither, and anything tagged c:bosses use a separate, gentler formula: health and damage only, time and distance axes only (no height), capped at +300% total. No tier abilities — a boss fight stays a boss fight, just one that grows with you.

blocks.html: Inspect any live mob's actual modifiers in-game with /tribulation inspect. Mod developers can read the same data through the public API.
